name: rpg-module-platform
description: Planning-phase monorepo for RPG content publishing and campaign management platform.

planningNotes.responsibility: Monorepo orchestration for client, server, and shared tooling.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
scripts.test: npm run test -w client && npm run test -w server
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w client && npm run lint -w server
